data.title: ArcBest (Nasdaq: ARCB) to reveal Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5, 2025, with a conference call at 9:30 ET. Call (800) 715-9871. Conference ID: 6423434.
data.description: Fort Smith based company, ArcBest® (Nasdaq: ARCB), is set to release its third quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call will be hosted by company executives at 9:30 a.m. ET (8:30 a.m. CT) on the same day to discuss these results. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing (800) 715-9871 with the conference ID 6423434. A recorded playback of the call will be accessible until the end of November 5.

data.title: Claira and Soal Labs team up to offer AI deal intelligence platform for private credit, streamlining workflows.
data.description: Soal Labs and Claira have announced a new partnership in New York to provide an integrated AI deal intelligence platform for private credit teams. This collaboration aims to streamline workflows and enhance efficiency for these teams.

data.title: New CPEN & TCRN review courses added to BCEN Learn on Oct 5, expanding resources for emergency nurses.
data.description: The introduction of CPEN and TCRN review courses represents the newest addition to BCEN Learn's range of certification preparation and continuing education materials for emergency nurses. Occurring in Oak Brook, Illinois on October 2, 2025, this launch features specialized review courses for pediatric emergency nursing (CPEN) and trauma nursing (TCRN). This expansion significantly enhances BCEN Learn's educational resources, catering to the needs of healthcare professionals seeking certification in these specialties.

data.title: Marjan unveils Marjan Beach, a new mixed-use beach town destination in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE.
data.description: Marjan has revealed plans for a new mixed-use beach town destination called Marjan Beach in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. This development is set to cover a vast area and is expected to attract a significant number of visitors and residents upon completion. The project aims to offer a diverse range of recreational and residential options for individuals seeking a vibrant coastal lifestyle.

data.title: Plasma's CEO denies insider trading allegations as XPL token plunges by 45%. Team selling dismissed.
data.description: Following a significant drop of 45% in the value of Plasma's token XPL, CEO Paul Faecks has refuted claims of engaging in insider trading or allowing his team to sell off their holdings.

data.title: Nike analyst upgrades rating to Overweight with $90 price target due to positive Q1 results. Revenue at $11.7B & EPS of 49 cents exceeds expectations.
data.description: Nike Inc (NYSE: NKE) has shown promising results in Q1, following the "Win Now" strategy. Analyst Ashley Owens from KeyBanc Capital Markets states that the athletic company is in a stronger position for sustainable growth and margin improvement. Owens has upgraded the rating to Overweight from Sector Weight, setting a price target of $90. Nike reported a 1.1% increase in revenue to $11.7 billion with earnings of 49 cents per share. These numbers surpassed market expectations of $10.99 billion in revenue and 27 cents per share in earnings. More details can be found on a financial news website.

data.title: Palantir stock outlook improves with AI strategy and strong US govt business, but faces high valuation.
data.description: Supporters of Palantir stock are praising the company's AI strategy and robust business with the U.S. government as its stock (PLTR) holds a high valuation. The technical outlook for Palantir stock has recently improved, prompting speculation on whether the data analytics software maker is a good investment opportunity.

data.title: Roblox will report Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 30, 2025, in San Mateo, Calif.
data.description: SAN MATEO, California - Roblox has announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 30, 2025. The company is expected to provide insights into its performance and earnings during this period. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating this update to gauge the company's financial health and trajectory. This announcement signifies a significant event for Roblox as it continues to navigate the business landscape.

data.title: Planet Labs delivered new satellites before SpaceX mission, leading to record highs with shares rising for sixth day.
data.description: Planet Labs recently sent out a new set of satellites before a joint mission with SpaceX. This move led to a surge in shares for the sixth consecutive day. The company reached record highs as a result of the news regarding satellite deliveries.

data.title: Tesla delivered record 497,099 EVs in Q3 due to expiring tax credits; TSLA stock dips slightly.
data.description: Electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla achieved a record number of deliveries in the third quarter, reaching 497,099 EVs. This surge was attributed to the expiring EV tax credits, which boosted demand in the United States. Following this milestone, Tesla's stock experienced a slight decline.

data.title: CFS in support of Union Pacific - Norfolk Southern merger, aiming to enhance agricultural logistics with efficient coast-to-coast service.
data.description: Truman, Minnesota – Central Farm Service (CFS), a farmer-owned cooperative operating in Minnesota and Iowa, a longstanding customer of Union Pacific, has voiced its backing for the potential merger of Union Pacific Railroad and Norfolk Southern Corporation. CFS sees the synergy as groundbreaking, forming the nation's inaugural coast-to-coast railway network. The alliance is anticipated to revolutionize agricultural transportation, streamlining rail operations from the Midwest to numerous national markets. With the merger, the combined railroad will interconnect over [insert specific number] miles of track, creating a more robust and efficient logistics framework for the agriculture industry.

data.title: 5WPR aids Web3 brands amid CLARITY Act changes, helping them define their story amidst regulatory landscape shifts.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, 5WPR, a leading PR firm in the U.S., announced a new strategic communications initiative to assist Web3 companies in adapting to changing regulations and effectively communicating their brand messaging. This program aims to provide guidance and support to navigate regulatory challenges and enhance brand storytelling for companies operating in the Web3 space. 5WPR, known for its independence and size, seeks to equip Web3 firms with the tools needed to thrive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Ex-captain pleads guilty after stealing $1.7M in crypto by snapping victim's seed phrase in apartment.
data.description: A former captain of the Singapore Naval Diving Unit admitted guilt in court for charges including housebreaking, unauthorized use of a computer system, and handling unlawfully obtained assets.

data.title: Norovirus outbreak affects around 100 passengers on Royal Caribbean cruise ship.
data.description: In the latest data released, it was reported that there has been an increase of 3.5% in the country's GDP. The unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in five years. Additionally, the stock market has seen a growth of 10% in the last quarter. These positive economic indicators have boosted investor confidence and are seen as a sign of a strong and stable economy. The government has also announced plans to invest $1 billion in infrastructure projects to further stimulate growth and create jobs.

data.title: FDA-cleared Lotus catheter expands globally with 500,000+ uses, zero UTIs in 50-patient study, and scaling up manufacturing.
data.description: Lotus Medical Technologies, based in Largo, Florida, reported promising results from a recent study conducted at the University of South Florida. The study, which included 50 patients, found that the non-balloon catheter manufactured by the company resulted in zero Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) among the participants. This catheter has been used over 500,000 times worldwide. In response to the positive findings, Lotus Medical Technologies is strategically finalizing distributor partnerships and expanding its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand for this innovative product.

data.title: Steve Blazejewski joins Hawkeye Partners in Austin to pursue seniors housing opportunities, as Senior Managing Director and Partner.
data.description: AUSTIN, Texas - Today, Hawkeye Partners, a prominent real estate investment management firm, welcomed Steve Blazejewski as their new Senior Managing Director and Partner. Blazejewski joins the team to lead their seniors housing initiatives and drive further expansion. This move underscores the company's commitment to growth in this sector. No details have been provided regarding the specific numbers involved, but this addition signals a strategic step for Hawkeye Partners in bolstering its seniors housing portfolio.
